channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google Injects AI-Powered Search Engine with Voice Activated Features
item.description: Google's latest search engine updates enable voice-activated searches, AI-powered results, and more links to other websites within search summaries.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The EU wants to know more about social media algorithms
item.description: Via the Digital Services Regulation (DSA), the European Commission has requested information from Youtube, Snapchat and Tiktok about which parameters their algorithms use to recommend social media content to users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 ways AI can make your programming job easier
item.description: It is not surprising that programmers have been the primary beneficiaries of AI; after all, programming is precisely the sort of thing an AI can analyze. It’s a logical, structured science that relies on rules, conditions and structure.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI continues to burn money
item.description: Although OpenAI’s revenues are increasing significantly, the generative AI (genAI) pioneer remains dependent on financial injections, according to Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How not to waste 34 hours a month in meetings
item.description: None of the participants will ever forget this meeting, that much is certain. The venue was the US Department of Defense, starring a new Secretary of State responsible for procurement, who was to lead her first meeting with suppliers and colleagues from her own company.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Uber and Lyft are funding opposition efforts over San Francisco transit ballot
item.description: Uber and Lyft are funding opposition efforts over a ballot initiative in San Francisco that’s meant to increase funding for the city’s public transit system.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Apple accused of violating labor laws, again
item.description: Apple has been accused of violating union rights, according to a complaint filed by the US National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) .
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Rise and Fall of 'She Deserved the Purse': A Viral Trend's Dark Side
item.description: A viral TikTok trend where people hid gift cards in baby aisles sparked a wave of kindness but ultimately turned into chaos, damaging products and disrupting store operations.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Silicon Valley has a plan to save humanity: Just flip on the nuclear reactors
item.description: Electricity consumption from data centers, AI and crypto mining (its own environmental headache) could double by 2026, according to the International Energy Agency.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Google just made a major ChromeOS misstep
item.description: Did you ever watch the early 2000s TV series Scrubs? The show revolved around a young doctor named JD who always meant well but often got lost in his own head and ended up making ill-advised decisions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft releases official OpenAI library for .NET
item.description: Microsoft has released its official OpenAI library for .NET, with the goal of ensuring a smooth, reliable integration experience for developers working with OpenAI and Azure OpenAI services in .NET applications. Announced October 1, the now-stable library follows a beta release published in June.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: US modifies AI chip export rules, boosting Middle East access
item.description: In a move aimed at facilitating the global development and supply of artificial intelligence (AI), the US Commerce Department has brought a new policy that will ease export restrictions for advanced AI chips to data centers in the Middle East and Central Asia.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The battle cry of 2025: Do cloud local!
item.description: Microclouds can have many names and offer many features. They can be hosted by a regional cloud provider or specialize in a specific use case, such as the rise of GPU cloud providers focusing on the exploding AI space.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon's $4 billion partnership with AI startup Anthropic gets UK competition clearance
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Friday that it's clearing Amazon's partnership with artificial intelligence company Anthropic because the $4 billion deal didn't qualify for further scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4
